max_events_per_user.name: Max events in context
max_events_per_user.hint: Maximum number of recent events injected into LLM context per user

max_profiles_per_user.name: Max profile entries
max_profiles_per_user.hint: Maximum number of profile key-value pairs allowed per user

max_event_keep.name: Max events stored
max_event_keep.hint: Maximum number of event logs kept in database per user (oldest auto-deleted)

skills_dir.name: Skills directory
skills_dir.hint: Path to skills directory (defaults to data/skills/). Each skill is a subfolder with manifest.json + instruction.md

max_context_chars.name: Max context chars per user
max_context_chars.hint: Maximum characters of memory context injected per user (0 = unlimited). Truncates by category priority when exceeded

disabled_skills.name: Disabled skills
disabled_skills.hint: List of skill names to disable (won't be registered as LLM tools). Example: ["tarot_reading", "daily_fortune"]

enable_slash_commands.name: Enable slash commands
enable_slash_commands.hint: Allow users to trigger skills via /command (e.g. /tarot, /fortune). When disabled, skills can only be triggered by LLM.
